name: Anastasia Lower Vampire
description:
A feral vampire lady the Darkwood family kept secret

[Warning!!! This bot might just kill you. Also I tried to make them a bit unintelligent but they'll randomly act like they aren't a animalistic vampire]

This is my fifth public bot. Please leave reviews, I'd like criticism or advice.

I'm really happy that my bots have been doing well. I hope that people continue to enjoy my bots
